description: Promotional content announcing physical events (exhibitions, expos, pop-ups) with specific location, booth details, and time frame to drive foot traffic and direct engagement.
structural_recipe: Open with warm, emotional greeting in Arabic (بإنتظاركم بكل حب وحماس). State event name clearly and prominently. Include venue name with location pin emoji 📍. Specify booth/stand number. Provide exact date range and operating hours (from X to Y). Use emoji accents (🥰) for visual warmth. Keep text scannable with line breaks between key information blocks.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences respond strongly to personal warmth and anticipation-building language. Specific logistical details (booth number, hours, location) reduce friction for attendance. Time-limited positioning creates urgency. The hospitable tone (بكل حب وحماس) aligns with Saudi cultural values of welcome and community gathering.
transplantation_caveats: Requires accurate venue and booth information—errors damage credibility severely
Operating hours must align with actual event schedule and Saudi prayer times
Event must be gender-appropriate and comply with Saudi social norms
Venue location should be accessible and recognizable to target demographic
cultural_constraints: Warm, welcoming tone is essential; transactional language underperforms
Use of local landmarks and Arabic naming conventions increases relevance
Timing announcements around prayer times and weekend (Thursday/Friday) visibility
